data.description: Decisions made by Vaisala Corp. Annual Meeting and Board of Directors.

data.title: FirstEnergy Ohio Customers Can Get Assistance with Electric Bills
data.description: In Akron, Ohio, as of March 24, 2026, it has been highlighted that assistance programs are available to aid customers in managing their energy expenses. With the drop in temperatures, home heating systems are under increased strain, particularly during extended cold spells, resulting in higher electric bills for residents. These programs aim to alleviate the financial burden on individuals by offering support during times of escalated energy consumption.

data.title: Decisions taken by Orion Corporation's Annual General Meeting and Board of Directors' organising meeting on 24 March 2026
data.description: On March 24, 2026, Orion Corporation announced decisions made during its Annual General Meeting and the Board of Directors' organizing meeting. The event took place at 16:30 EET. Key decisions were made regarding the company's future direction and strategy.

data.title: Advanced Aviation Team Introduces Ambassador, a New Jet Card Program Built for Discerning Private Aviation Clients
data.description: A private aviation charter advisory firm, Advanced Aviation Team (AAT), based in Arlington, Virginia, introduced an exclusive jet card program named Ambassador. This program is tailored for clients seeking privacy, reliability, and customized private aviation experiences. The founder, Gregg Brunson-Pitts, a former high-level government official, leads the company in providing specialized services including family office support, security-sensitive travel arrangements, and global mission assistance. Ambassador by Advanced Aviation Team is aimed at a select clientele who value personalized service and consistency in their air travel.
Iranian Foreign Ministry: Araghchi explained to his Malaysian counterpart the possibility of non-war-related ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: HealthDyne Partners with CaryHealth to Power Scalable Direct-to-Patient Therapy Programs
data.description: Two prominent companies, HealthDyne and CaryHealth, have joined forces to enhance therapy access and patient adherence through a combination of digital engagement and scalable pharmacy infrastructure. This collaboration aims to assist life sciences partners in accelerating therapy access and improving patient adherence. The announcement was made in Lakeland, Florida on March 24, 2026. HealthDyne, renowned for its digital pharmacy services, is set to leverage CaryHealth's scalable pharmacy infrastructure to achieve this goal. This partnership signifies a significant step in enhancing healthcare services and is expected to benefit a wide range of stakeholders involved in the healthcare industry.

data.title: QC Ware, CQE to co-host Q2B x Chicago Quantum Summit, underscoring growing strength of Quantum Prairie
data.description: Mark your calendars for the Q2B26 x Chicago Quantum Summit, taking place from December 8 to 10 at the Marriott Marquis Chicago and McCormick Place in Chicago. The event will bring together two prominent quantum technology conferences in a collaboration that promises to be groundbreaking. This exciting initiative will occur on March 24, 2026, and is set to showcase cutting-edge developments in the field.

data.title: USOP ASCs Again Recognized Among Nation's Best by U.S. News & World Report
data.description: In Jackson, Mississippi on March 24, 2026, it was announced that two ambulatory surgery centers linked to U.S. Orthopaedic Partners (USOP) have been recognized as top performers in orthopedics and spine care by U.S. News & World Report. This accolade further solidifies USOP's reputation in the industry.

data.title: Potomac Edison Maryland Customers Can Get Help with Seasonal Energy Costs
data.description: In Williamsport, Maryland on March 24, 2026, families are experiencing fluctuations in temperatures, leading to increased electricity usage for maintaining home comfort. This rise in energy consumption is resulting in higher utility bills for many households. To assist customers in managing these costs, Potomac Edison, a subsidiary of FirstEnergy (NYSE:), is offering solutions to help customers monitor and control their energy expenses.

data.title: ParaZero Technologies Ltd. Announces Closing of $4 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: Israel-based aerospace defense company ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: PRZO) has recently completed a registered direct offering with a single institutional investor. The offering involved the purchase and sale of around $4 million worth of ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants, each priced at $0.75 per ordinary share. The company specializes in developing smart, autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems within the global defense industry. The successful completion of this offering will likely bolster the company's financial position and further support its innovative ventures in the aerospace sector.

data.title: Paul Daversa Named “Individual of the Year” as Daversa Redefines Executive Search for the AI Era
data.description: In San Francisco, Daversa revealed that its Founder and CEO, Paul Daversa, has been honored as the "Individual of the Year" in the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards by the Business Intelligence Group. This recognition comes as he successfully transformed Daversa into an AI-focused organization during a pivotal moment. Instead of just adding AI onto existing processes, he integrated it deeply into operations, decision-making processes, talent management strategies, and the company's daily functions. The award underscores his significant contribution to the firm's evolution towards being AI-centric.
